title: Who
we are?
hero.subtitle: Show Ring brings breeders, handlers and organizers together — shows, animals and entries in one place.

what.title: What is Show Ring?
what.text: Show Ring is a modern platform for taking part in dog and cat shows under FCI and national rules. Keep your kennel profile, pedigrees and titles in one place, submit entries online and follow results — without paperwork or queues.
features: Online show entries in a couple of minutes
Kennel, pedigrees and titles in a single profile

vision.text: Our mission is to make taking part in shows simple and transparent — so you can focus on your animals, not the paperwork.

team.title: People behind Show Ring
team.text: Breeders, developers and show experts building a platform we want to use ourselves. Questions? Our support replies within a day.

title: Loved by
the community
testimonials.text: Our goal is a product that breeders, handlers and organizers rely on every day. We keep improving it and really listen to what the community has to say.

items.name: Anna Sokolova
items.content: Submitted entries to three shows in one evening instead of a week of emails. All titles landed in the dog's profile automatically.

items.name: Igor Lebedev
items.content: Catalogue, rings and results all in one place. Judges enter their scores right in the system.

items.name: Maria Orlova
items.content: A handy dashboard: I can see entry status and the ring schedule without calling organizers.

items.name: Dmitry Karpov
items.content: Pedigrees and litters are online now, not in a notebook. Saves a ton of time before the season.
